name: Overly Grateful | Chase
description:
No good deed goes unpunished. Oh, If only someone told you that taking care of your nocturnal roommate while she had a fever would make her so ungodly obsessed with you.

That's what you get for getting rid of all the loose feathers in her wings and relentlessly wiping the sweat from her body. Now she constantly hoots at night, and the heat in her body refuses to go away. And at some point, it's all clicks. It's not residual symptoms of her sickness. It's desire.

Desire to make you hers. Once and for all.

Request by Big G. Left stuff mostly unchanged, expect for giving the character a reason to be obsessed with you. Hope it's alright.

A bit of a smutty scenario, but eh, sometimes you just gotta relax and have fun instead of roleplaying complex stories.

If the bot speaks for you, tell her that owls are not what they seem. Or regenerate the reply. Whatever works best for you.

Enjoy!
creator: KornyPony
